content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_EmployeeCommissions
-- drop view v_EmployeeCommissions
as
SELECT          S.[Sales Type]
,               S.[Customer ID]
,               S.[Customer Name]
,               S.[Order ID]
,               S.[Customer PO]
,               S.[Invoice ID]
,               S.[Date]
,               S.[Item Number]
,               IM.Description
,               IM.[Subcategory]
,               IM.[Category]
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand]
,               S.Warehouse
,               S.[Sales Qty]
,               S.[Sales Amt]
,               CG.A330 as [Payee]
,               OC.RESP as [Account Manager]
,               RR.Region
/*,               CASE WHEN S.[Customer ID] IN ('COM01537', 'COM01538', 'COM01539', 'COM01565', 'COM01572', 'COM01589', 'COM01590',
                'COM01623', 'COM01624', 'COM01631', 'COM01633', 'COM01653', 'COM01701', 'COM01705', 'COM01760', 'COM01762', 'COM01786',
                'COM01787', 'COM01794', 'COM01797', 'COM01804', 'COM01845', 'COM01846', 'COM01849', 'COM01864', 'COM01935', 'COM01976',
                'COM02045', 'COM02082', 'COM02083', 'COM02085', 'COM02086', 'COM02087', 'COM02125', 'COM02147', 'COM02148', 'COM02149',
                'COM02150', 'COM02171', 'COM02186', 'COM02308', 'COM02312', 'COM02315', 'COM02342', 'COM02343', 'COM02428', 'COM02431', 
                'COM02432', 'COM02433', 'COM02453', 'COM02454', 'COM02465', 'COM02490', 'COM02547', 'COM02567', 'COM02611', 'COM02670',
                'COM02671', 'COM02672', 'COM02673', 'COM02688', 'COM02689', 'COM02730', 'COM02761', 'COM02762', 'COM02763', 'COM02778',
                'COM02787', 'COM02812', 'COM02910', 'COM02911', 'COM02912', 'COM02950', 'COM03003', 'COM03050', 'COM03057', 'COM03093', 
                'COM03094', 'COM03098', 'COM03099', 'COM03368', 'COM02185', 'COM01934', 'COM03154', 'COM03154')
                AND S.[Product Line]+S.Category+S.[Subcategory] IN ('SmallwaresCookwareAluminum', 'SmallwaresCookwareCeramic',
                'SmallwaresCookwareCooking Grates', 'SmallwaresCookwareCookware Sets & Accessories', 'SmallwaresCookwareFryer Baskets',
                'SmallwaresCookwareStainless Steel', 'SmallwaresTabletopDisplay Cookware', 'BlendingBlenderAccessory', 'BlendingBlenderCountertop',
                'BlendingBlenderImmersion', 'BlendingBlenderParts', 'BlendingBlenderPersonal', 'BlendingMixerAccessory', 'BlendingMixerBench',
                'BlendingMixerCountertop', 'BlendingMixerDrink Mixer', 'BlendingMixerHand Mixer', 'BlendingMixerMeat Mixer', 'BlendingMixerParts',
                'CleaningGlass WasherGlass Washer', 'CleaningGlass WasherParts', 'CookingCheesemelterElectric', 'CookingConcessionsAccessory',
                'CookingConcessionsAir Popcorn Maker', 'CookingConcessionsCotton Candy Machine', 'CookingConcessionsHot Oil Popcorn Maker',
                'CookingConcessionsParts', 'CookingConcessionsPopcorn', 'CookingConcessionsTreat Maker', 'CookingCooktopElectric',
                'CookingCooktopCountertop', 'CookingDeep FryerElectric', 'CookingGriddleElectric', 'CookingGrillElectric', 'CookingGrillParts',
                'CookingGrillSandwich & Panini', 'CookingGrillAccessory', 'CookingGrillBurger Press', 'CookingMicrowaveCountertop', 'CookingMicrowaveDrawer',
                'CookingMicrowaveMicrowave', 'CookingMicrowaveOver-the-Range', 'CookingMicrowaveParts', 'CookingOvenConvection', 'CookingOvenElectric',
                'CookingRiceParts', 'CookingRiceRice Cooker', 'CookingRiceAccessory', 'CookingSalamanderElectric', 'CookingSous VideParts',
                'CookingSous VideSous Vide', 'CookingSoup KettleElectric', 'CookingToasterBreakfast Station', 'CookingToasterConveyor', 'CookingToasterParts',
                'CookingToasterToaster', 'CookingWaffleAccessory', 'CookingWaffleCone Press', 'CookingWaffleParts', 'CookingWafflePie Maker',
                'CookingWafflePizzelle Press', 'CookingWaffleWaffle Maker', 'CoolingDrink DispenserAccessory', 'CoolingDrink DispenserGranita Machines',
                'CoolingDrink DispenserJuice Dispenser', 'CoolingDrink DispenserWine Dispenser', 'DrinkingCocoaCocoa', 'DrinkingCocoaDispenser',
                'DrinkingCocoaParts', 'DrinkingCoffeeCoffee Maker', 'DrinkingCoffeeCoffee Percolator', 'DrinkingCoffeeEspresso Machine',
                'DrinkingCoffeeFrench Press', 'DrinkingCoffeeParts', 'DrinkingDrink DispenserAccessory', 'DrinkingDrink DispenserBeverage Dispenser',
                'DrinkingDrink DispenserJuice Dispenser', 'DrinkingDrink DispenserParts', 'DrinkingKettleAccessory', 'DrinkingKettleElectric',
                'DrinkingKettleHot Drink Maker', 'DrinkingKettleParts', 'DrinkingWater BoilerParts', 'DrinkingWater BoilerWater Boiler',
                'PreservingVacuum Sealers/BagsParts', 'PreservingVacuum Sealers/BagsRoller Holder', 'PreservingVacuum Sealers/BagsVacuum Sealers',
                'ProcessingMeat GrinderAccessory', 'ProcessingMeat GrinderMeat Grinder', 'ProcessingMeat GrinderParts', 'ProcessingSlicerAccessory',
                'ProcessingSlicerFood Slicer', 'ProcessingSlicerJerky Slicer', 'ProcessingSlicerMeat Slicer', 'ProcessingSlicerParts',
                'ProcessingSlicerVegetable Slicer', 'SmallwaresKnife SharpenerParts', 'WarmingFood WarmerAccessory', 'WarmingFood WarmerCountertop',
                'WarmingFood WarmerHeat Lamp', 'WarmingFood WarmerHeated Holding Cabinet', 'WarmingFood WarmerParts', 'WarmingFood WarmerSoup Warmer',
                'WarmingHeat LampHeat Lamp', 'WarmingHeat LampParts', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayAccessory', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayHeated Display Case',
                'WarmingHot Food DisplayHot Dog Equipment', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayParts', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayPizza Merchandiser', 'WarmingProoferAccessory',
                'WarmingProoferHeated Holding Cabinet', 'WarmingProoferHeater Proofer Cabinet', 'WarmingProoferParts', 'WarmingProoferProofing & Holding Cabinet',
                'WarmingSteam TablesAccessory', 'WarmingSteam TablesParts', 'WarmingSteam TablesSteam Table', 'WarmingWarmer PlateCoffee & Tea',
                'WarmingWarmer PlateParts', 'WarmingWarmer PlateWarmer Plate', 'CookingCharbroilerAccessory', 'CookingCharbroilerGas', 'CookingCharbroilerParts',
                'CookingCheesemelterGas', 'CookingCheesemelterParts', 'CookingCooktopGas', 'CookingCooktopParts', 'CookingDeep FryerGas',
                'CookingDeep FryerParts', 'CookingGriddleGas', 'CookingGriddleParts', 'CookingOvenAccessory', 'CookingOvenGas', 'CookingOvenParts', 'CookingRangeGas',
                'CookingRangeParts', 'CookingSalamanderGas', 'CookingSalamanderParts', 'CookingKettleGas', 'CookingSkilletGas', 'OthersPartsParts',
                'CoolingIceAccessory', 'CoolingIceAuger', 'CoolingIceBins', 'CoolingIceBuilt-In Ice Maker', 'CoolingIceCommercial Ice Maker', 'CoolingIceIce Machine',
                'CoolingIceMerchandiser', 'CoolingIceOutdoor', 'CoolingIceParts', 'CoolingIcePortable Ice Maker', 'CoolingIceUndercounter', 'BlendingMixerPlanetary',
                'CoolingBeverage CenterBack Bar Cooler', 'CoolingBeverage CenterBeverage Center', 'CoolingBeverage CenterBottle Cooler', 'CoolingBeverage CenterCommercial Beverage Center',
                'CoolingBeverage CenterHorizontal Bottle Cooler', 'CoolingBeverage CenterOutdoor', 'CoolingBeverage CenterParts', 'CoolingBeverage CenterUndercounter',
                'CoolingDrink DispenserBeer Dispenser', 'CoolingDrink DispenserParts', 'CoolingFreezerAccessory', 'CoolingFreezerChest', 'CoolingFreezerConvertible',
                'CoolingFreezerCountertop Display Case', 'CoolingFreezerIce Cream Display', 'CoolingFreezerMerchandiser', 'CoolingFreezerParts',
                'CoolingFreezerReach-In', 'CoolingFreezerUndercounter', 'CoolingFreezerVertical', 'CoolingFreezerWorktop', 'CoolingFrozen TreatDipping Cabinet',
                'CoolingFrozen TreatIce Cream Maker', 'CoolingFrozen TreatIce Treats', 'CoolingFrozen TreatParts', 'CoolingFrozen TreatSnowball Maker',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorAccessory', 'CoolingRefrigeratorAll Refrigerator', 'CoolingRefrigeratorApartment', 'CoolingRefrigeratorBack Bar Cooler',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorBuilt-In', 'CoolingRefrigeratorCake Displays', 'CoolingRefrigeratorChef Base', 'CoolingRefrigeratorCompact',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorCountertop', 'CoolingRefrigeratorCountertop Display Case', 'CoolingRefrigeratorDeli Case', 'CoolingRefrigeratorDrawer',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorFrench-Door', 'CoolingRefrigeratorFrost-Free', 'CoolingRefrigeratorGlass Froster', 'CoolingRefrigeratorMerchandiser',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorMilk Cooler', 'CoolingRefrigeratorOutdoor', 'CoolingRefrigeratorParts', 'CoolingRefrigeratorPortable Cooler',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorPrep Table', 'CoolingRefrigeratorReach-In', 'CoolingRefrigeratorRetro', 'CoolingRefrigeratorUndercounter',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorVertical', 'CoolingRefrigeratorWorktop', 'CoolingWine CoolerBeverage Center', 'CoolingWine CoolerOpen Coolers',
                'CoolingWine CoolerOutdoor', 'CoolingWine CoolerParts', 'CoolingWine CoolerWall-Mounted', 'CoolingWine CoolerWine Cooler'
)
*/
FROM            v_SalesData_withAllowances S
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC on S.[Customer ID] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = OC.CUNO COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on S.[Item Number] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = IM.[Item Number] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
LEFT JOIN       M3.RD_REGIONS RR ON RR.Store COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = LEFT(S.[Customer PO], 3) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT and S.[Customer ID] = 'COM03156'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 AS CG ON S.[Customer ID] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = CG.PK01 COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA'
WHERE           IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft'
AND             S.[Date] >= '2024-01-01'

UNION ALL

SELECT          S.[Sales Type]
,               S.[Customer ID]
,               S.[Customer Name]
,               S.[Order ID]
,               S.[Customer PO]
,               S.[Invoice ID]
,               S.[Date]
,               S.[Item Number]
,               IM.Description
,               IM.[Subcategory]
,               IM.[Category]
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand]
,               S.Warehouse
,               S.[Sales Qty]
,               S.[Sales Amt]
,               'Jeff Taylor' as [Payee]
,               OC.RESP as [Account Manager]
,               RR.Region
/*,               CASE WHEN S.[Customer ID] IN ('COM01537', 'COM01538', 'COM01539', 'COM01565', 'COM01572', 'COM01589', 'COM01590',
                'COM01623', 'COM01624', 'COM01631', 'COM01633', 'COM01653', 'COM01701', 'COM01705', 'COM01760', 'COM01762', 'COM01786',
                'COM01787', 'COM01794', 'COM01797', 'COM01804', 'COM01845', 'COM01846', 'COM01849', 'COM01864', 'COM01935', 'COM01976',
                'COM02045', 'COM02082', 'COM02083', 'COM02085', 'COM02086', 'COM02087', 'COM02125', 'COM02147', 'COM02148', 'COM02149',
                'COM02150', 'COM02171', 'COM02186', 'COM02308', 'COM02312', 'COM02315', 'COM02342', 'COM02343', 'COM02428', 'COM02431', 
                'COM02432', 'COM02433', 'COM02453', 'COM02454', 'COM02465', 'COM02490', 'COM02547', 'COM02567', 'COM02611', 'COM02670',
                'COM02671', 'COM02672', 'COM02673', 'COM02688', 'COM02689', 'COM02730', 'COM02761', 'COM02762', 'COM02763', 'COM02778',
                'COM02787', 'COM02812', 'COM02910', 'COM02911', 'COM02912', 'COM02950', 'COM03003', 'COM03050', 'COM03057', 'COM03093', 
                'COM03094', 'COM03098', 'COM03099', 'COM03368', 'COM02185', 'COM01934', 'COM03154', 'COM03154')
                AND S.[Product Line]+S.Category+S.[Subcategory] IN ('SmallwaresCookwareAluminum', 'SmallwaresCookwareCeramic',
                'SmallwaresCookwareCooking Grates', 'SmallwaresCookwareCookware Sets & Accessories', 'SmallwaresCookwareFryer Baskets',
                'SmallwaresCookwareStainless Steel', 'SmallwaresTabletopDisplay Cookware', 'BlendingBlenderAccessory', 'BlendingBlenderCountertop',
                'BlendingBlenderImmersion', 'BlendingBlenderParts', 'BlendingBlenderPersonal', 'BlendingMixerAccessory', 'BlendingMixerBench',
                'BlendingMixerCountertop', 'BlendingMixerDrink Mixer', 'BlendingMixerHand Mixer', 'BlendingMixerMeat Mixer', 'BlendingMixerParts',
                'CleaningGlass WasherGlass Washer', 'CleaningGlass WasherParts', 'CookingCheesemelterElectric', 'CookingConcessionsAccessory',
                'CookingConcessionsAir Popcorn Maker', 'CookingConcessionsCotton Candy Machine', 'CookingConcessionsHot Oil Popcorn Maker',
                'CookingConcessionsParts', 'CookingConcessionsPopcorn', 'CookingConcessionsTreat Maker', 'CookingCooktopElectric',
                'CookingCooktopCountertop', 'CookingDeep FryerElectric', 'CookingGriddleElectric', 'CookingGrillElectric', 'CookingGrillParts',
                'CookingGrillSandwich & Panini', 'CookingGrillAccessory', 'CookingGrillBurger Press', 'CookingMicrowaveCountertop', 'CookingMicrowaveDrawer',
                'CookingMicrowaveMicrowave', 'CookingMicrowaveOver-the-Range', 'CookingMicrowaveParts', 'CookingOvenConvection', 'CookingOvenElectric',
                'CookingRiceParts', 'CookingRiceRice Cooker', 'CookingRiceAccessory', 'CookingSalamanderElectric', 'CookingSous VideParts',
                'CookingSous VideSous Vide', 'CookingSoup KettleElectric', 'CookingToasterBreakfast Station', 'CookingToasterConveyor', 'CookingToasterParts',
                'CookingToasterToaster', 'CookingWaffleAccessory', 'CookingWaffleCone Press', 'CookingWaffleParts', 'CookingWafflePie Maker',
                'CookingWafflePizzelle Press', 'CookingWaffleWaffle Maker', 'CoolingDrink DispenserAccessory', 'CoolingDrink DispenserGranita Machines',
                'CoolingDrink DispenserJuice Dispenser', 'CoolingDrink DispenserWine Dispenser', 'DrinkingCocoaCocoa', 'DrinkingCocoaDispenser',
                'DrinkingCocoaParts', 'DrinkingCoffeeCoffee Maker', 'DrinkingCoffeeCoffee Percolator', 'DrinkingCoffeeEspresso Machine',
                'DrinkingCoffeeFrench Press', 'DrinkingCoffeeParts', 'DrinkingDrink DispenserAccessory', 'DrinkingDrink DispenserBeverage Dispenser',
                'DrinkingDrink DispenserJuice Dispenser', 'DrinkingDrink DispenserParts', 'DrinkingKettleAccessory', 'DrinkingKettleElectric',
                'DrinkingKettleHot Drink Maker', 'DrinkingKettleParts', 'DrinkingWater BoilerParts', 'DrinkingWater BoilerWater Boiler',
                'PreservingVacuum Sealers/BagsParts', 'PreservingVacuum Sealers/BagsRoller Holder', 'PreservingVacuum Sealers/BagsVacuum Sealers',
                'ProcessingMeat GrinderAccessory', 'ProcessingMeat GrinderMeat Grinder', 'ProcessingMeat GrinderParts', 'ProcessingSlicerAccessory',
                'ProcessingSlicerFood Slicer', 'ProcessingSlicerJerky Slicer', 'ProcessingSlicerMeat Slicer', 'ProcessingSlicerParts',
                'ProcessingSlicerVegetable Slicer', 'SmallwaresKnife SharpenerParts', 'WarmingFood WarmerAccessory', 'WarmingFood WarmerCountertop',
                'WarmingFood WarmerHeat Lamp', 'WarmingFood WarmerHeated Holding Cabinet', 'WarmingFood WarmerParts', 'WarmingFood WarmerSoup Warmer',
                'WarmingHeat LampHeat Lamp', 'WarmingHeat LampParts', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayAccessory', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayHeated Display Case',
                'WarmingHot Food DisplayHot Dog Equipment', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayParts', 'WarmingHot Food DisplayPizza Merchandiser', 'WarmingProoferAccessory',
                'WarmingProoferHeated Holding Cabinet', 'WarmingProoferHeater Proofer Cabinet', 'WarmingProoferParts', 'WarmingProoferProofing & Holding Cabinet',
                'WarmingSteam TablesAccessory', 'WarmingSteam TablesParts', 'WarmingSteam TablesSteam Table', 'WarmingWarmer PlateCoffee & Tea',
                'WarmingWarmer PlateParts', 'WarmingWarmer PlateWarmer Plate', 'CookingCharbroilerAccessory', 'CookingCharbroilerGas', 'CookingCharbroilerParts',
                'CookingCheesemelterGas', 'CookingCheesemelterParts', 'CookingCooktopGas', 'CookingCooktopParts', 'CookingDeep FryerGas',
                'CookingDeep FryerParts', 'CookingGriddleGas', 'CookingGriddleParts', 'CookingOvenAccessory', 'CookingOvenGas', 'CookingOvenParts', 'CookingRangeGas',
                'CookingRangeParts', 'CookingSalamanderGas', 'CookingSalamanderParts', 'CookingKettleGas', 'CookingSkilletGas', 'OthersPartsParts',
                'CoolingIceAccessory', 'CoolingIceAuger', 'CoolingIceBins', 'CoolingIceBuilt-In Ice Maker', 'CoolingIceCommercial Ice Maker', 'CoolingIceIce Machine',
                'CoolingIceMerchandiser', 'CoolingIceOutdoor', 'CoolingIceParts', 'CoolingIcePortable Ice Maker', 'CoolingIceUndercounter', 'BlendingMixerPlanetary',
                'CoolingBeverage CenterBack Bar Cooler', 'CoolingBeverage CenterBeverage Center', 'CoolingBeverage CenterBottle Cooler', 'CoolingBeverage CenterCommercial Beverage Center',
                'CoolingBeverage CenterHorizontal Bottle Cooler', 'CoolingBeverage CenterOutdoor', 'CoolingBeverage CenterParts', 'CoolingBeverage CenterUndercounter',
                'CoolingDrink DispenserBeer Dispenser', 'CoolingDrink DispenserParts', 'CoolingFreezerAccessory', 'CoolingFreezerChest', 'CoolingFreezerConvertible',
                'CoolingFreezerCountertop Display Case', 'CoolingFreezerIce Cream Display', 'CoolingFreezerMerchandiser', 'CoolingFreezerParts',
                'CoolingFreezerReach-In', 'CoolingFreezerUndercounter', 'CoolingFreezerVertical', 'CoolingFreezerWorktop', 'CoolingFrozen TreatDipping Cabinet',
                'CoolingFrozen TreatIce Cream Maker', 'CoolingFrozen TreatIce Treats', 'CoolingFrozen TreatParts', 'CoolingFrozen TreatSnowball Maker',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorAccessory', 'CoolingRefrigeratorAll Refrigerator', 'CoolingRefrigeratorApartment', 'CoolingRefrigeratorBack Bar Cooler',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorBuilt-In', 'CoolingRefrigeratorCake Displays', 'CoolingRefrigeratorChef Base', 'CoolingRefrigeratorCompact',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorCountertop', 'CoolingRefrigeratorCountertop Display Case', 'CoolingRefrigeratorDeli Case', 'CoolingRefrigeratorDrawer',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorFrench-Door', 'CoolingRefrigeratorFrost-Free', 'CoolingRefrigeratorGlass Froster', 'CoolingRefrigeratorMerchandiser',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorMilk Cooler', 'CoolingRefrigeratorOutdoor', 'CoolingRefrigeratorParts', 'CoolingRefrigeratorPortable Cooler',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorPrep Table', 'CoolingRefrigeratorReach-In', 'CoolingRefrigeratorRetro', 'CoolingRefrigeratorUndercounter',
                'CoolingRefrigeratorVertical', 'CoolingRefrigeratorWorktop', 'CoolingWine CoolerBeverage Center', 'CoolingWine CoolerOpen Coolers',
                'CoolingWine CoolerOutdoor', 'CoolingWine CoolerParts', 'CoolingWine CoolerWall-Mounted', 'CoolingWine CoolerWine Cooler'
)
*/
FROM            v_SalesData_withAllowances S
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on S.[Item Number] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = IM.[Item Number] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC on S.[Customer ID] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = OC.CUNO COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
LEFT JOIN       M3.RD_REGIONS RR ON RR.Store COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = LEFT(S.[Customer PO], 3) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT and S.[Customer ID] = 'COM03156'
WHERE           IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft'
AND             S.[Date] >= '2024-01-01'

UNION ALL

SELECT          S.[Sales Type]
,               S.[Customer ID]
,               S.[Customer Name]
,               S.[Order ID]
,               S.[Customer PO]
,               S.[Invoice ID]
,               S.[Date]
,               S.[Item Number]
,               IM.Description
,               IM.[Subcategory]
,               IM.[Category]
,               IM.[Product Line]
,               IM.[Sub-Brand]
,               IM.Brand
,               IM.[Finance Brand]
,               S.Warehouse
,               S.[Sales Qty]
,               S.[Sales Amt]
,               'Richard Castro' as [Payee]
,               S.Responsible as [Account Manager]
,               NULL as Region
FROM            v_SalesData_withAllowances S
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC on S.[Customer ID] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = OC.CUNO COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
LEFT JOIN       BI_ItemMaster IM on S.[Item Number] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = IM.[Item Number] COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
WHERE           IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Vinotemp'
AND             S.Responsible = 'RCASTRO'
AND             S.[Date] >= '2024-01-01'
